description: Patch defaults for current gbrain. Runtime Anthropic SDK calls are handled by anthropic-override.js, so the old Haiku/Sonnet source substitutions stay disabled. The enabled source patches add cheap OpenAI-compatible expansion touchpoints where upstream gbrain currently exposes chat only. gbrain-patchkit post-upgrade reapplies enabled patches after gbrain upgrades.

substitutions.name: env-driven expansion model (legacy source patch — superseded by anthropic-override.js)
env-driven subagent default model (legacy source patch — superseded by anthropic-override.js)
DeepSeek can serve query expansion
LiteLLM can serve query expansion and chat
OpenAI-compatible expansion honors *_BASE_URL and *_API_KEY optional env
Bare Anthropic-compatible expansion model ids route to anthropic provider
Anthropic-compatible gateways may use non-Claude model ids
